Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf Florence Corcoran'S Further Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Jet Car Limousine, Fabricio Siguera's Motion To Compel Further Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has filed. Plaintiff is ordered to make a further verified response within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. The declaration does not contain facts supporting the amount of sanction being sought. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040]. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Assigned To Arbitration On May-05-08; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Jun-16-08 At 10:00 A.M.
